name: Abyssal Dragon

granted_abilities.name: Incorporeal
granted_abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

granted_actions.name: Dark Bargain
granted_actions.effects: Deal 1 irreducible damage to the target, then the target may declare the Interact action.

extraction_notes: The Limitations section shows a single dash '-', indicating no limitations apply to this upgrade.
